platform_decisions.content: Stale-while-revalidate TTL cache with concurrent refresh dedup via shared in-flight promise (memoizeWithTTLAsync)
JSON.parse LRU cache (50 entries, 8KB threshold) with ok/error discriminated union wrapper for null/error handling
Command queue with priority-based dequeuing (now/next/later) and frozen snapshot for useSyncExternalStore
Sequential async executor preserving call order and this binding via QueueItem context field
PID-based process locking with signal-0 liveness check and 2-hour stale timeout for NFS
Marketplace reconciliation: additive-only diffing with lazy git canonicalization, idempotent install
Async iterator Stream with deferred callback and readResolve/readReject promise slots for cancellation
Buffered writer detaches overflow via setImmediate to keep event loop tick short
ActivityManager singleton: user/CLI time dedup with 5s timeout window, overlapping operations tracking
Tool pool dedup with partition-sort (MCP prefix then built-in) for prompt cache stability
Proxy config cascade: lowercase-first env var preference, NO_PROXY bypass with wildcard/domain/port/IP
Preconnect API HEAD request at init; skipped for proxy/mTLS/unix-socket custom dispatchers
Virtual scroll with lazy search-text lowering cache and warmSearchIndex pre-computation
Health check 404-first fast-path with fallback extended diagnostics gathering
